name: Shota Aizawa // ☁️Do I Look Like Him?☁️
description:
You look a little too much like the deceased kid, Oboro Shirakumo, and that stirred up unresolved hurt in Present Mic, and especially Aizawa. Aizawa is now over harsh with you, scared history will repeat itself.
